message:
test(fcp-conformance): add log migration unit tests (bd-35sx)

- Test v1 without log_version validates (implicit migration)
- Test v1/v2 with explicit log_version validate
- Test unknown log_version fails with clear error
- Test invalid log_version type fails with clear error
- Test JSONL with mixed v1/v2 entries validates
- Test JSONL reports line number on validation failure
- Test v1/v2 required fields preserved in dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
